description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to any branch and tag matching [0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has a concurrency group based on the GitHub reference and cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of three build jobs (Windows, macOS, Linux) with matrix strategies for configuration and architecture, and a deploy job that runs on ubuntu-latest and depends on the build jobs. The deploy job only runs on tag pushes to refs/tags/ and if the base reference is refs/heads/prod or refs/heads/dev.
